ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the package is distributed */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the package's repository */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the package */,
  "maintainer" TEXT /* Maintainer or maintainer team of the package */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  "star_count" INTEGER /* Number of stars or likes the package has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization for which the project is being developed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "import_methods" TEXT /* Methods imported from the package */,
  "import_classes" TEXT /* Classes imported from the package */,
  "required_packages" TEXT /* Other packages required by the package */,
  "heaviness" INTEGER /* Heaviness metric for the package in the project */,
  "imported_methods_count" INTEGER /* Number of methods imported from the package */,
  "imported_classes_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes imported from the package */,
  "required_packages_count" INTEGER /* Number of required packages */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the method has been imported */,
  "last_imported" TEXT /* Date and time the method was last imported */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the method is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "import_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the class has been imported */,
  "last_imported" TEXT /* Date and time the class was last imported */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the class is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_import_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_packages" (
  "required_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each required package */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "required_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the required package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the required package */,
  "import_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the required package has been imported */,
  "last_imported" TEXT /* Date and time the required package was last imported */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the required package is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("required_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the project */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heaviness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "heaviness_score" INTEGER /* Heaviness score of the package in the project */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "method_count" INTEGER /* Number of methods in the package */,
  "class_count" INTEGER /* Number of classes in the package */,
  "file_count" INTEGER /* Number of files in the package */,
  "line_count" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code in the package */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_metrics_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heaviness_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
